trusted_baseline.commit_semantics: Verified GitHub merge commit for PR #8 before the governed-baseline-resolution workstream was created; live GitHub state determines the current main head.

workstreams.objective: Add immutable commissioned-baseline records, append-only replacement and invalidation evidence, exact applicability resolution, explicit rejection and ambiguity outcomes, and deterministic baseline-versus-envelope drift assessment without diagnosing faults or authorizing equipment action.
verification_criteria: the pull-request diff remains inside permitted_paths
baseline applicability requires exact asset, component, observation, operating mode, configuration, firmware, calibration, sampling profile, and context-tag agreement
no matching baseline and multiple matching baselines remain explicit outcomes rather than hidden fallback selection
replacement and invalidation evidence is append-only and preserves prior baseline records
baseline drift remains distinct from approved operating-envelope status
suspect or bad observations, mismatched units, and mismatched applicability are not compared
drift findings do not assert fault, root cause, safe production change, or authorization

verification_evidence.local_targeted_validation: New baseline unit tests and JSON parsing are validated before publication where tooling permits.
verification_evidence.evidence_boundary: Local validation is supporting evidence only. Live exact-current-head GitHub CI is authoritative for CI verification after the branch is published.

workstreams.next_gate: Implement only the declared baseline slice, obtain exact-current-head CI, perform independent read-only review of the exact head and scope, then require explicit human approval before merge.

authoritative.notes: Owns the deterministic machine-event reasoning core and current LineAlert implementation lineage.

active_related_boundaries.notes: Owns governed evidence-package and transport contracts; it is not merged into LineAlert Core.
Owns containment and policy enforcement; it is not the LineAlert implementation repository.

design_archaeology.disposition: Do not merge or copy wholesale into linealert-core. Reuse requires a new bounded branch, explicit source attribution, current authority boundaries, focused tests, and review.
Not an active implementation source. Preserve only as historical repository evidence.
Preserve as design archaeology. Persistence and retrieval integration require a separately governed current architecture and package boundary.

deployment_state.evidence: No current LineAlert Core deployment evidence is recorded in this repository state.
